title: List component — ordered and unordered
description: Typography lists with bullets, circles, decimals, and nested composition for React docs and forms.

og.title: Typography · Lists · Zentauri UI
og.description: Typography lists with bullets, circles, decimals, and nested composition for React docs and forms.

twitter.title: Typography · Lists · Zentauri UI
twitter.description: Typography lists with bullets, circles, decimals, and nested composition for React docs and forms.

intro: Switch between ordered and unordered markers, nest lists inside items, and align tone with surrounding copy.

faqs.question: How do I nest lists?
faqs.answer: Place another List inside a List.Item child; keep nesting shallow for readability.

faqs.question: Can markers be removed?
faqs.answer: Use marker="none" on unordered lists when building custom layouts while keeping semantic ul structure.

faqs.question: Are ordered lists always decimal?
faqs.answer: Ordered lists apply decimal styling by default; extend via className if you need alternate schemes.

sections.heading: What it does
sections.body:
Exposes ul and ol variants with shared tone styling.

List.Item renders relaxed line-height items ready for nested lists.

sections.heading: Composition and API
sections.body:
Use ordered for sequences and unordered for collections.

Apply marker styles only when ordered is false.

sections.heading: Accessibility
sections.body:
Announce lists with proper ul/ol semantics.

Ensure nested lists maintain coherent reading order.

sections.heading: Next.js integration notes
sections.body:
Static lists render from server components.

Hydrate only when adding interactive reordering.
